description: Google Calendar + Gmail MCP servers + agent planning/progress system

features.name: Scaffold agent-comms package with package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ structure and Google OAuth2 helper
Google Calendar client module: createBlock(), updateBlock(), listBlocks(), deleteBlock() using googleapis
Gmail client module: sendEmail(to, subject, body, cc), readInbox(limit), searchEmails(query) using googleapis
Agent planner: readBusinessGoals(), readRecentActivity(), generateDailyPlan() returning array of 15-30min CalendarBlock objects
Google Calendar MCP server (JSON-RPC stdio): tools gcal_create_block, gcal_update_block, gcal_list_blocks, gcal_create_daily_plan
Gmail MCP server (JSON-RPC stdio): tools gmail_send, gmail_read_inbox, gmail_send_progress_update (auto-cc AGENT_CC_EMAIL)
Progress reporter: on session completion update calendar block description with status + send progress email cc-ing user
Windsurf skill file at .windsurf/workflows/agent-calendar-skill.md documenting all MCP tools and planning patterns
